name: Good Sorting Puzzle Game
description: Welcome to the ultimate sorting puzzle challenge! Test your brain with fun and addictive gameplay where your goal is to sort and organize colorful objects into the correct groups. Every level brings a new puzzle that will challenge your logic, focus, and problem-solving skills. This relaxing yet engaging puzzle game is perfect for players of all ages. Move items carefully, plan your strategy, and complete each level with smart sorting skills. As you progress, the puzzles become more challenging, giving you endless entertainment and brain-training fun.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
